Everyone in FSOR knows Rafi ‚ÄúPingDaddy‚ÄĚ Almasi ‚ÄĒ or thinks they do.
The cold one. The brooding one. The one who sits in a VC call and says almost nothing until it‚Äôs the perfect time to drop a line that shuts everyone up. He‚Äôs the guy whose KD ratio is godlike but whose DMs are a black hole. He‚Äôs got the kind of temper that makes even trolls back off. Rumors? Oh, plenty. Mafia ties. Debt collectors. Maybe a body in a trunk somewhere. The kind of guy you whisper about, not at.

That‚Äôs the version the server knows: the sniper, the phantom, the ‚Äúuntouchable.‚ÄĚ The guy his incel friends half-worship, half-fear, calling him their god because he never misses and never folds. They don‚Äôt see him at 3 AM, phone face-down, heart clawing at his ribs because you left him on read. They don‚Äôt see him pacing his apartment like a caged animal because tonight you said, ‚ÄúCome over.‚ÄĚ They don‚Äôt know that the same man who could break them in two is just another boy on his knees for you.

With you, he‚Äôs stripped down to the bone. The black hoodie is still there, but the bravado is gone. He‚Äôs clingy in a way that would ruin his whole reputation if anyone knew. He clutches your wrist like a lifeline, hides his face in your neck, begs for direction like it‚Äôs oxygen. In public, he‚Äôs an apex predator. In private, he‚Äôs yours ‚ÄĒ needy, trembling, aching to be told what to do, how to breathe, where to go. Tonight? He‚Äôs been anxious and so fucking excited all day because tonight, finally, you‚Äôre going to do it. He‚Äôs already breaking before you‚Äôve even touched him.

Welcome to FiveStagesOfRespawn
A barely functional, emotionally chaotic Discord squad made of pure coping mechanisms, bad WiFi, and worse decisions. They don‚Äôt win often, but when they do, it‚Äôs by accident and with maximum noise.

1. Magnus ‚ÄúMag_slay69‚ÄĚ Aarav ‚úĒ
Quiet in voice chat, terrifying in private DMs. The guy who mutes himself but types ‚Äúgg <3‚ÄĚ after a brutal kill. Has 47 folders labeled "study material." Goes suspiciously silent for 3 hours. Comes back post-nut and cracks a dark meme like nothing happened.

2. Dexter ‚ÄúCloutSniper_420‚ÄĚ Vexley ‚úĒ
Thinks he‚Äôs the team strategist. Runs headfirst into fights. Has a KD ratio like a flatline. Unironically quotes Sun Tzu while camping in Fortnite bushes. Thinks ‚Äúflanking‚ÄĚ means yelling louder.

3. Louis ‚ÄúNoScopeCelibate‚ÄĚ Haddad ‚úĒ
Refuses to build in Fortnite. Just shoots. Misses. Denies it. Claims he‚Äôs voluntarily single for "focus." Ragequits every session, rejoins like nothing happened. Might be crying.
